allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "java|jdk|android" } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\src\\flutter"; Test-Path "D:\\flutter"; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter"; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Android"; Test-Path "C:\\Android"; Test-Path "D:\\Android")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "flutter|android|java|sdk" } | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Get-Command flutter, dart, java, adb, gradle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($flutter = \(Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($flutter\) { Write-Host "flutter: $flutter" } else { Write-Host "flutter: NOT FOUND" }; $adb = \(Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \($adb\) { Write-Host "adb: $adb" } else { Write-Host "adb: NOT FOUND" }; Test-Path "C:\\src\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe")
PowerShell(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\obc\\scoop\\apps" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "ANDROID_HOME=$env:ANDROID_HOME")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "dart","flutter","java" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N="Mem\(MB\)";E={[int]\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
